name: Sarah Hay
title: Director of Sales Enablement
quote: Serving with Tory on a Mission Trip to Honduras showed me what faith-driven leadership looks like in action. His ability to align vision, people, and service created meaningful impact and stretched me as a leader in the marketplace and beyond. I saw firsthand how Tory leads with conviction, humility, and purpose. He consistently empowered others to serve with excellence while keeping Christ at the center of every decision.
